title: 目標達成の後に・みんなのちゃんこ鍋☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A new post on Umasta reads, "Announcing the
Chanko Tournament! Show off your best chanko
to everybody! ☆ Apply now!"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Aaand posted!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I sure hope everybody has fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a fine day, and I find myself at the Chanko
Tournament, an event Hishi Akebono set up for
her fans.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect so many people to come! Thank
you so much, everybody!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Just a reminder of the rules I posted on
Umasta—every one of you will have to make your
own chanko.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Do you have your recipes ready?

text_block_list.name: Bono Fans
text_block_list.text: We sure do!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Great! Looks like your preparations are
perfect. ☆ Let's have fun, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to get cooking!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, it's interesting how you have different ways
to make broth.

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I prefer to slowly simmer kombu seaweed,
bonito flakes, and various dried seafoods
together to bring out their flavor.

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I prefer to save time by using a blend of
store-bought soup base and chicken broth.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I see! Both have a very buono aroma!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I see you're making a spicy chanko with
gochujang paste and kimchi!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, and you're using miso! It smells so nice!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Watching everyone has inspired me so much!
Trainer, let's try to make the best chanko ever!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! I watched Bono's latest stream, and
well... You're Bono's trainer, right?

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I was really happy when we got to see a new side
of Bono as a racer!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I became quite interested in races after that, and
I really want to see her race in person!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Me too! After that stream, I realized races were
more exciting than I thought!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Hishi Akebono's strategy of filling up the
stands by filling up the audience's stomachs first
is working great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone seems to be enjoying chanko
tournament until...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh? That aroma...

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what do you think you're doing, adding in
pork and curry roux? This isn't a curry
competition, you know.

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan D
text_block_list.text:
But my kids love it when I make this chanko for
them. They say they like this version the best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small argument breaks out near the edge of the
venue.

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan C
text_block_list.text: You're giving your children this and calling it chanko? Let me set things straight for you.

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan C
text_block_list.text: My father is a chef and he says real chanko is made with chicken meatballs and vegetables.

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan D
text_block_list.text: B-but—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sparks start flying, but Hishi Akebono puts an
end to it by making a casual remark.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's true that chanko made with chicken meatballs
and veggies is yummy and buono.

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan C
text_block_list.text: Oh! Bono...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But the neat thing about chanko is that each
sumo stable has its own unique recipe.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
There are salty variations and spicy ones. Some
wrestlers even add cheese and yogurt into their
chanko.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Each stable creates their own chanko by making
different adjustments to the recipe.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's those differences that make their flavors so
special and memorable.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's why I think it's okay not to use chicken
meatballs or veggies in your chanko if you don't
want to.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
As long as your chanko makes the people who eat
it happy and ready to keep working hard, then it's
real chanko!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan C
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I was being too narrow-minded...

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan D
text_block_list.text:
I got caught up in the moment too, so I
apologize.

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan C
text_block_list.text:
No, it was all me... And I'm sorry I ruined your
event, Bono...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! You don't have to apologize! There's
nothing to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But enough of that. The broth of your chanko
looks so clear and tasty!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You must've put a lot of effort into getting the
basics exactly right while making this.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The meat in your curry chanko looks super yummy
too! ♪ I think tons of people will love this!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Everyone made so many types of chanko. There
are spicy ones and creamy ones...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
They might be different, but they all look so
buono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I can't wait to try each one with you all! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono's easygoing energy clears the air,
and the Chanko Tournament ends on a warm
note.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her bond with her fans has grown even stronger!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Thanks for the great time at the Chanko
Tournament, everyone!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "All of your chankos were very buono!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Let's all protect and preserve our own unique
flavors! ☆"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Aaand posted!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... That was so much fun, and there was so
much great chanko.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Best of all, a whole lot more people are
interested in racing now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm gonna do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Sprinters S. will be held right after summer
camp ends. Now's the time to ramp up our
training so we can be at our best for it!
